mcq:
What is the first letter of the alphabet?
a) B b) A c) C d) D

Which letter comes after B?
a) A b) C c) D d) E
short: Write the letters: A, B, C
What is the capital letter of 'a'?

mcq:
What color is the sky?
a) Red b) Blue c) Green d) Yellow

What color is an apple?
a) Red b) Blue c) Black d) White

How many fingers on one hand?
a) 4 b) 5 c) 6 d) 10

What comes after 3?
a) 2 b) 4 c) 5 d) 6
short: How many apples do you see?

mcq:
Who is your father?
a) My sister b) My dad c) My friend d) My teacher

I have a _____.
a) Mother b) Brother c) Sister d) All of the above
tf: My mother is a family member. [True/False]
short: Write the names of your family members

mcq:
Which animal can fly?
a) Dog b) Bird c) Cat d) Cow

Which animal says 'meow'?
a) Dog b) Cat c) Cow d) Sheep
tf: A lion is a wild animal. [True/False]
short: What sound does a dog make?

mcq:
Which one is a fruit?
a) Carrot b) Apple c) Potato d) Onion

What color is a banana?
a) Red b) Yellow c) Green d) Blue
tf: We should not wash fruits before eating. [True/False]

mcq:
We see with our:
a) Nose b) Eyes c) Ears d) Mouth

We eat with our:
a) Eyes b) Ears c) Mouth d) Hands
short: What do you use to hear?

mcq:
We say _____ in the morning.
a) Good night b) Good morning c) Good evening d) Goodbye

What do you say when you leave?
a) Hello b) Goodbye c) Thank you d) Sorry
tf: We say 'Hello' when we meet someone. [True/False]
We say 'Thank you' when someone helps us. [True/False]
short: What do you say to your teacher?
